# Revalidation Copilot

> An AI-powered app that helps UK nurses and midwives complete their NMC revalidation — reflective accounts, CPD tracking, practice hours, feedback storage, and reflective discussion notes, all in one place.

## What it does

- **Generates NMC-compliant reflective accounts** — speak or type your experience, the app structures it into the NMC format with Code theme connections, ready to review and export
- **Tracks CPD hours** — log participatory and non-participatory CPD, see running totals against the 35-hour requirement (including the 20 hours participatory minimum)
- **Calculates practice hours** — enter your date range and contracted hours, the app works out your total automatically against the 450-hour requirement
- **Organises feedback and reflective discussion notes** — keep everything for your 3-year revalidation cycle in one dashboard
- **Auto-links to the NMC Code** — reflections automatically identify the best Code theme match: Prioritise People, Practise Effectively, Preserve Safety, or Promote Professionalism and Trust
- **Portfolio export** — export completed reflective accounts as PDF for submission

## Who it's for

UK nurses, midwives, and nursing associates on the NMC register who want to complete revalidation without last-minute stress. Particularly useful for nurses managing revalidation alongside full-time clinical work.

## Pricing

- Free to try (1 free AI generation, full dashboard access)
- £12.99/year for unlimited AI generations, save and export
- See full pricing details: https://www.revalidationaicopilot.co.uk/pricing.md

## About

Built by Beemal Innovation Ltd. An independent tool — not affiliated with, endorsed by, or approved by the Nursing and Midwifery Council (NMC).

Contact: https://www.revalidationaicopilot.co.uk/contact.html
